curation_notes: The patch commit (ffeff7c) replaces an unsafe mem::replace/mem::uninitialized block in the io::Read impl for MultiDecoder in src/gzip.rs with the sound take_mut crate. Only src/gzip.rs contained the actual vulnerability fix; Cargo.toml and src/lib.rs changes were just adding the take_mut dependency. No sibling files share the same vulnerability pattern — huffman.rs uses mem::replace but with safe Node::empty() values, not mem::uninitialized(). Vulnerability class confirmed as use-after-free (CWE-416) matching the pre-assigned class.
